title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Freshly Printed Manuals
gist.blurb: Our API documentation just got an automatic refresh to match the latest production deployment.
gist.summary: Automatically regenerated APIDOCS.md to sync with the latest OpenAPI spec changes from production.
gist.impact: Developers building on the platform now have access to the most up-to-date API documentation.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a librarian, organizing freshly printed API documentation. The Nomnom creature eating outdated pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing glowing lime green (#ecf874) books on a wooden library shelf. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old paper documents nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
